MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Camille Aroustamian, Esq. 818-401-5939 Law Office for Plaintiff.
Arianna Camargo, Esq. 619-400-8000 Klinedinst PC for Defendant Flix.
Chandrani Manal. Esq. 925-642-0804 Cholokian & Associates for Defendant Screamline.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. The Court hears argument on both motions. Ms. Camargo contests and presents arguments; Flix broker. Court comments and poses questions on paragraphs. Ms. Aroustamian presents arguments. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

1 - DEFENDANT FLIXBUS INC. MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT

Defendant FlixBus, Inc.'s motion to strike.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Camille Aroustamian, Esq. 818-401-5939 Law Office for Plaintiff.
Arianna Camargo, Esq. 619-400-8000 Klinedinst PC for Defendant Flix.
Chandrani Manal. Esq. 925-642-0804 Cholokian & Associates for Defendant Screamline.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. The Court hears argument on both motions. Ms. Camargo contests and presents arguments; Flix broker. Court comments and poses questions on paragraphs. Ms. Aroustamian presents arguments. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant FlixBus Inc's Demurrer.

Taken Under Submission.***
